item.title: VAPI v2 API launches with breaking changes
item.description: VAPI announced breaking changes to its v2 API including new authentication and payload schemas.

item.title: ElevenLabs Conversational v3 ships with sub-200ms latency
item.description: ElevenLabs rolled out Conversational v3 with sub-200ms end-to-end latency for real-time voice agents.

item.title: Anthropic Claude 4.7 ships with 1M context window
item.description: Anthropic released Claude 4.7 featuring a 1 million token context window, a significant jump for long-form analysis.

item.title: Stable Diffusion 4 released under open-source license
item.description: Stable Diffusion 4 is now available under a permissive open-source license, marking a new milestone for the project.

item.title: OpenAI announces new GPT-5 pricing tiers
item.description: OpenAI revealed new pricing tiers for GPT-5 API usage targeted at scaling developers.

item.title: LangGraph 2.0 adds stateful agent primitives
item.description: LangGraph 2.0 introduces stateful agent primitives aimed at long-running agent workflows.

item.title: Third-party MCP servers cross 500 in public registry
item.description: The public MCP server registry now lists more than 500 third-party implementations, signaling broad ecosystem adoption.

item.title: Google Gemini 3 API moves to general availability
item.description: Google's Gemini 3 API has graduated to general availability with new enterprise-focused capabilities.
